Name: Restless Steward
Summary: Opening ghost caster that pressures random players with bolts and a double dispel.
Description:
[Kick] Spend as many interrupts as possible on Spirit Bolt.
[Dispel] Soul Torment lands on two players; dispel one immediately and heal the second through.
[Priority] This is the first scary caster in the dungeon and worth cleaning up early.

Name: Bloated Lasher
Summary: Garden caster whose rot window empowers nearby lashers.
Description:
[Kick] Fungal Bolt is the repeatable stop target.
[Healer] Prepare for Spore Dispersal and remember it also boosts nearby lashling melee damage.
[Tank] Use a defensive if empowered lashers remain in range during the channel.

Name: Ardent Cutthroat
Summary: Rogue trash with a poison cast and a random-target jump.
Description:
[Kick] Stop every Poison Blades cast.
[Positioning] Shadowrive is easier to cleave down when the marked player stays close to the pack.
[Priority] This mob is a clean stop target in duo and trio pulls.

Name: Devoted Woebringer
Summary: Immune caster that alternates heavy bolts with a shielded scream.
Description:
[Kick] Keep Shadow Bolt under control while building damage for Pulsing Shriek.
[Healer] Use cooldowns when the shielded scream begins if the shield will not break instantly.
[Priority] Focus this mob first in most packs because the shielded channel gets ugly fast.

Name: Phalanx Breaker
Summary: Charge bruiser that punishes bad positioning and active casting.
Description:
[Dodge] Sidestep Break Ranks and, if possible, aim the charge into a wall for efficient cleave.
[Cast Stop] Interrupting Screech requires the group to stop casting immediately.
[Priority] Respect this mob in caster-heavy pulls where the screech can cause extra chaos.

Name: Phantasmal Mystic
Summary: Immune support caster with a mandatory interrupt and a dangerous enrage aura.
Description:
[Kick] Interrupt every Chain Lightning cast.
[Healer] Flame Nova is the scary group hit, especially when paired with random axe throws.
[Soothe] At 50% the mob enrages nearby enemies with Ephemeral Bloodlust, so soothe if possible or finish it quickly.
